display_text: Ripper's Lash. Tier 3: AOE Physical Damage debuff. Embeds thorns into all enemies in a 200 radius area, causing them to take additional physical damage from attacks for 10 seconds. Can be used aggressively to initiate fights or defensively to deter aggression by amplifying your team's damage output. Stats: CD: 25s, Duration: 10s.
